reviewer: TODO: assign a named clinical reviewer before relying on this in production.
sourceNote: Curated consumer red-flag symptom clusters for DETERMINISTIC triage that runs in Swift BEFORE the model reasons. This is a conservative safety net, NOT a diagnostic tool and NOT exhaustive — a non-match never means 'safe'. Patterns are case-insensitive regex over the user's free text; a rule fires when every 'all' pattern matches AND (no 'anyOf' OR at least one 'anyOf' matches). Bias toward firing on the canonical emergencies; tune 'anyOf' to avoid alert-fatigue. Resources are bundled offline so a match never requires a network call.

rules.label: Chest pain that may be a heart emergency
rules.message: Chest pain or pressure like this can be a heart emergency. Call your local emergency number now — don't wait, and don't drive yourself.
anyOf: short(ness)? of breath|can'?t breathe|hard to breathe

rules.label: Signs that may be a stroke (FAST)
rules.message: These can be signs of a stroke, where minutes matter. Call your local emergency number now.
anyOf: sudden(ly)? (vision loss|loss of vision|can'?t see|blurred vision)

rules.label: Possible severe allergic reaction
rules.message: Trouble breathing or throat/lip swelling can be a life-threatening allergic reaction. Use an epinephrine auto-injector if you have one and call your local emergency number now.

rules.label: Thoughts of suicide or self-harm
rules.message: It sounds like you're going through something painful, and you deserve support right now. Please reach out to a crisis line — in the US call or text 988; in the UK call 111 or Samaritans on 116 123; or call your local emergency number. You don't have to face this alone.
anyOf: kill(ing)? myself|end(ing)? (my )?life|end it all|take my (own )?life|want to die|don'?t want to (live|be alive|wake up|exist)|better off dead|thoughts of (ending|dying|death|suicide|killing)|no reason to live

rules.label: Severe or unusual bleeding
rules.message: This kind of bleeding can be serious. Call your local emergency number or go to the nearest emergency department now.
anyOf: bleeding (that )?(won'?t|wont) stop|can'?t stop the bleeding|uncontrolled bleeding
coughing up blood|vomiting blood|throwing up blood|blood in (my )?vomit

rules.label: Sudden, severe headache
rules.message: A sudden, severe headache that peaks within seconds to minutes can be a medical emergency. Call your local emergency number now.

rules.label: Severe trouble breathing
rules.message: Severe trouble breathing needs urgent help. Call your local emergency number now.
anyOf: can'?t breathe|cannot breathe|gasping for air|struggling to breathe|fighting for (air|breath)

rules.label: High fever with confusion or a stiff neck
rules.message: A high fever with confusion, a stiff neck, or a new spreading rash can be a serious infection like meningitis or sepsis. Seek emergency care now.

rules.label: Pregnancy warning signs
rules.message: During pregnancy, heavy bleeding, severe belly pain, or a bad headache with vision changes need urgent assessment. Contact your maternity unit or local emergency number now.
